meta_description: A=etupte wa itak a=eyayhonokka wa itak kampinuye a=eyaypakasnu kusu itak a=oeroski katu a=nukare pirka noka a=kar ro!
meta_keywords: word order, linguistics, translation, language learning, syntax visualization
meta_image_alt: Preview of the Word Order Illustrator with linked words across two languages.
input_guidance: itak eramuan kikay an yakun ani wa isam yakun ohap aytaksay’usarayep itakpo kosiusaraye. {delimiter} a=eywanke wa na nokanno a=usaraye easkay. {example} neno ene an hi ne.
input_gloss_empty: Add words first to enter annotations.
footer_info: Tan aeywankep or wa e=kar noka anakne ciunkore tum konrusuy ka somo ki ruwe ne kusu, e=eywanke yakka, e=omante yakka, eani e=ramu kuni p e=ki easkay. Tan aeywankep e=asuraste yakka tan sos e=omante yakka en=kore yakun, eci=eyairayke wa.
confirm_delete_sentence: Tan itaksay a=isamka yak pirka ruwe an?
confirm_new: Asir itaksay a=kar yak pirka ruwe an? Ipe opitta a=isamka kusu ne.
confirm_load_example: "{name}" itakkurkasi a=eyaykosanniyo? Tan itak omare neno oka or wa epakno isamka kor naa kar kuni.
about_tagline: Usa okay itakpo a=ekote wa itak a=oeroski katu a=nukare noka ci=kar kuni p ne aeywankep ne.
about_credit: {author} or wa a=esanniyo wa 2022 pa 8 cup wa ci=kar wa an wa orowa ci=pirkare a ci=pirkare a.
settings_tagline: Bring your own API key. Translations and alignments are generated directly from your browser.
settings_privacy: Your API key is stored only in this browser (localStorage) and sent directly to the chosen provider — never to our servers.
input_translate_hint: Translate existing sentences to more languages (uses your API key).
translate_cost_notice: Each request bills your own {provider} account. Cheaper models are usually fine for this.
settings_model_hint: Pick a suggestion or type any model ID the provider accepts.
